# Complex Research Task

## Overview

This is a more complex task that requires detailed planning and multiple steps.

## Objectives

1. Research the topic thoroughly
2. Analyze findings
3. Create actionable recommendations
4. Document results

## Requirements

### Must Have
- Comprehensive analysis
- Supporting data
- Clear recommendations

### Nice to Have
- Visual diagrams
- External references
- Timeline estimates

## Constraints

- Must be completed within the processing time limit
- Output must be in Markdown format
- Follow the standard plan structure

## Success Criteria

- [ ] All objectives addressed
- [ ] Requirements met
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Quality standards achieved
